Normal: DD > −a (within a% of state-machine peak)  |  Draw-up: DD ≤ −a & DU > b (bounced b%+ from trough)  |  Decline: DD ≤ −a & DU ≤ b
Peak resets to current price when DD first crosses −a% · Trough resets to current price when DU first crosses +b%
